IT-Mission & Vision

Mission

As the Directorate of Information Technologies at Kadir Has University, our mission is to provide a reliable, innovative, and sustainable information technology infrastructure so that our university can carry out its academic, administrative, and student processes with the highest efficiency. While providing uninterrupted support to research, education, and administrative activities with our technological solutions, we adopt the principles of information security, user satisfaction, and accessibility as our priority values.

Vision

As the Directorate of Information Technologies at Kadir Has University, our vision is to support the digital transformation of our students, academic staff, and administrative units by using technology effectively, securely, and accessibly in all areas of campus life. With innovative solutions, strong infrastructure, and a continuous improvement mindset, our ultimate goal is to be a technology center that is cited as an example in the field of information technologies, maintains user satisfaction at the highest level, and guides the strategic goals of our university.

Our Values

Innovation:

Following emerging technologies closely to offer the most up-to-date and efficient solutions to our university.

Reliability:

Protecting our users' data and our systems with the highest security standards.

User-Centricity:

Approaching the needs of students, academic staff, and administrative personnel in a fast, effective, and solution-oriented manner.

Accessibility:

Offering all our services to every user in an equal and easily accessible way.

Continuous Improvement:

Continuously improving our service quality, infrastructure, and know-how.

Collaboration:

Contributing to common goals by working in harmony with all units of the university.
